message:
style: Apply rustfmt and clippy lints to core modules

Formatting and lint cleanup across demo showcase and renderer modules:

src/bin/demo_showcase.rs:
- Realign command palette action mapping for consistent column widths
- Split long clippy allow attributes across multiple lines
- Reformat draw_colors_section gradient bar calls
- Clean up box options formatting

src/input/parser.rs:
- Minor formatting adjustments

src/renderer/diff.rs, mod.rs, hitgrid.rs:
- Apply rustfmt indentation fixes

No functional changes - pure style cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
